# Indic Cosmological architecture style

Wikidata ID: Q137126588
Description: Architectural planning based on Indic cosmological principles, incorporating mandala layouts, sacred geometry, and directional alignments to reflect the universe and facilitate spiritual experience. (ID: INHF-926629265-18-11-25-II)
